import torch
import torch.nn as nn


class ResidualBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim: int, dropout: float = 0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(dim, dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(dim, dim),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
        )
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(dim)

    def forward(self, x):
        return self.norm(x + self.net(x))


class ForecastMLP(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, seq_len: int = 96, n_features: int = 7, pred_len: int = 720, hidden_dim: int = 1024, num_blocks: int = 4, dropout: float = 0.1):
        super().__init__()
        self.seq_len = seq_len
        self.n_features = n_features
        self.pred_len = pred_len
        in_dim = seq_len * n_features
        out_dim = pred_len * n_features

        self.input = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(in_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
        )
        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(*[ResidualBlock(hidden_dim, dropout=dropout) for _ in range(num_blocks)])
        self.output = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, out_dim)

    def forward(self, x):
        # x: [B, 96, 7]
        b = x.shape[0]
        x = x.reshape(b, -1)
        x = self.input(x)
        x = self.blocks(x)
        x = self.output(x)
        x = x.reshape(b, self.pred_len, self.n_features)
        return x
